No cards yet

STATS REFERENCE
Import a league stats CSV so cards auto-fill

Upload your league stats export (.csv or .xlsx). It reads the Batting and Pitching sections automatically (the two-row header format). Players are matched by Last + First name.

Click to choose stats CSV…
No file loaded yet.
BULK IMPORT
Spreadsheet + photo ZIP → auto-generate a card set
1 Upload regular-season stats CSV

The same export format as Stats Import (Number/Last/First + Batting/Pitching columns). This file creates your player list — one player per name found in it, with jersey number read from the Number column. If a player has multiple rows (one per year), give each row's season a year below and every row will show up as a separate year on their card.

Click to choose regular-season stats CSV…
2 Upload playoff stats CSV (optional)

Same format. Matched to players already loaded above by name — players not found in step 1 are skipped (upload regular-season stats first).

Upload regular-season stats first…
3 Upload the photo ZIP (optional)

A .zip of photos named firstinitial+lastname.jpg (e.g. dsteele.jpg). Players without a match still generate (no photo).

Click to choose photo ZIP…
4 Review & import

Team, position, division and hometown aren't in the stats CSV — fill them in per player below (or click fill all to apply one value to everyone, then adjust the exceptions).

Importing…
